SEARCH
Package com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.model

Class Booking

java.lang.Object
com.ducksabervn.projects.ketchup.backend.model.Booking
public class Booking extends Object
Represents a single movie ticket booking placed by a registered user. Each booking captures the user's email, the target movie and showtime, the seats selected, the total amount charged, and whether the booking has already been written to the CSV file on disk.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors

    Description
    Booking(String bookingEmail, String bookingId, String movieId, LocalDateTime showtime, HashSet<String> chosenSeats, int totalPrice, boolean isProcessed)
    Constructs a new Booking with all required fields.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    getBookingEmail()
    Returns the email address of the user who made this booking.
    String
    getBookingId()
    Returns the unique identifier of this booking.
    HashSet<String>
    getChosenSeats()
    Returns the set of seat IDs selected by the user for this booking.
    String
    getMovieId()
    Returns the ID of the movie associated with this booking.
    LocalDateTime
    getShowtime()
    Returns the scheduled showtime of the booked movie session.
    int
    getTotalPrice()
    Returns the total price charged for this booking.
    boolean
    isProcessed()
    Returns whether this booking has been persisted to BOOKINGS.csv.
    void
    setProcessed(boolean processed)
    Sets the processed flag for this booking, indicating whether it has been written to BOOKINGS.csv.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

  • Constructor Details

    • Booking

      public Booking(String bookingEmail, String bookingId, String movieId, LocalDateTime showtime, HashSet<String> chosenSeats, int totalPrice, boolean isProcessed)
      Constructs a new Booking with all required fields.
      Parameters:
      bookingEmail - the email address of the user making the booking
      bookingId - the unique UUID string identifying this booking
      movieId - the ID of the movie being booked
      showtime - the scheduled showtime of the movie session
      chosenSeats - the set of seat IDs selected by the user
      totalPrice - the total price for all selected seats
      isProcessed - true if this booking has already been written to disk, false otherwise

  • Method Details

    • getBookingEmail

      public String getBookingEmail()
      Returns the email address of the user who made this booking.
      Returns:
      the booking owner's email address

    • getBookingId

      public String getBookingId()
      Returns the unique identifier of this booking.
      Returns:
      the booking ID as a UUID string

    • getMovieId

      public String getMovieId()
      Returns the ID of the movie associated with this booking.
      Returns:
      the movie ID as a UUID string

    • getShowtime

      public LocalDateTime getShowtime()
      Returns the scheduled showtime of the booked movie session.
      Returns:
      the showtime as a LocalDateTime

    • getChosenSeats

      public HashSet<String> getChosenSeats()
      Returns the set of seat IDs selected by the user for this booking.
      Returns:
      a HashSet of seat ID strings (e.g. "A1", "B3")

    • getTotalPrice

      public int getTotalPrice()
      Returns the total price charged for this booking.
      Returns:
      the total price in dollars

    • isProcessed

      public boolean isProcessed()
      Returns whether this booking has been persisted to BOOKINGS.csv.
      Returns:
      true if the booking has been written to disk, false if it exists only in memory

    • setProcessed

      public void setProcessed(boolean processed)
      Sets the processed flag for this booking, indicating whether it has been written to BOOKINGS.csv.
      Parameters:
      processed - true to mark as persisted, false otherwise
